---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature or improvement
title: "[Feature] "
labels: feature
assignees: ''
---

## Problem Statement
A clear description of the problem or need this feature addresses.

## Proposed Solution
Describe the solution you'd like.

## Alternatives Considered
Describe any alternative solutions or features you've considered.

## PRD Reference
If this relates to a feature in the [CTOS PRD](../../CTOS_PRD.md), reference the feature ID (e.g., F-001).

## Additional Context
Any mockups, screenshots, or other context about the feature request.
